codes.title: Merge a Black Hole Codes
codes.intro: Redeem Merge a Black Hole codes to claim free coins, boosts, and limited-time rewards. New codes are released during game updates and special events, so check back regularly to grab every bonus.

codes.reward: Free coins, boosts, and limited-time rewards

howToRedeem: Open Merge a Black Hole on Roblox
Tap the Codes icon on the main screen
Paste or type your code into the input box
Press Redeem to claim your rewards instantly

beginnerGuide.title: Merge a Black Hole Beginner Guide
beginnerGuide.intro: Merge a Black Hole is a Roblox merge simulator where you grow a black hole by collecting objects and increasing its size. New players can follow these steps to understand merging, resource collection, and progression.

steps.title: Start Collecting Objects
steps.description: Move your black hole around the map and absorb available objects to increase its size and earn resources.

steps.title: Grow Your Black Hole
steps.description: Use collected resources to expand your black hole and unlock the ability to absorb larger objects.

steps.title: Improve Progression Speed
steps.description: Focus on upgrades and efficient farming routes to increase your overall growth speed.

steps.title: Keep Expanding
steps.description: Continue merging and collecting resources to reach higher progression levels and bigger targets.

quickTips: Move toward dense clusters of objects to fill your black hole faster.
Spend early coins on size upgrades before anything else.
Absorb larger objects as soon as your black hole can handle them.
Watch for bonus zones that multiply your resource gains.

rebirthGuide.title: Merge a Black Hole Rebirth Guide
rebirthGuide.intro: Rebirth is a major progression system in Merge a Black Hole that lets you restart your current growth cycle in exchange for permanent bonuses. Use rebirth strategically to increase future farming speed and reach higher black hole levels faster.

steps.title: Grow Your Black Hole
steps.description: Merge objects, collect items, and gather enough resources to increase your black hole power before attempting a rebirth.

steps.title: Reach Rebirth Requirements
steps.description: Complete the progression goals needed to unlock the rebirth option and prepare your reset.

steps.title: Activate Rebirth
steps.description: Reset your current progress to receive permanent bonuses that improve your future growth speed.

steps.title: Repeat With Better Efficiency
steps.description: Use your rebirth bonuses to collect resources faster and unlock higher progression milestones.

gameplayTips.title: Merge a Black Hole Gameplay Tips
gameplayTips.intro: These gameplay tips focus on improving resource collection, upgrade decisions, and overall progression efficiency in Merge a Black Hole. Use these strategies to grow your black hole faster and make better upgrade choices.

tips.title: Prioritize Growth Speed
tips.description: Focus on upgrades and actions that increase how quickly your black hole can consume objects and generate resources.

tips.title: Merge Efficiently
tips.description: Combine available objects strategically to unlock stronger results and improve your overall progression rate.

tips.title: Use Resources Wisely
tips.description: Save currency for valuable upgrades instead of spending resources on low-impact improvements.

tips.title: Optimize Farming Routes
tips.description: Choose efficient areas and object clusters to maximize the amount of resources gained over time.

tips.title: Plan Rebirth Timing
tips.description: Wait until a rebirth provides meaningful progression benefits instead of resetting too early.

leaderboardGuide.title: Merge a Black Hole Leaderboard Guide
leaderboardGuide.intro: Leaderboard success in Merge a Black Hole depends on efficient resource collection, smart upgrade choices, and consistent progression. This guide explains the main strategies used by competitive players.

rows.strategy: Collect resources efficiently and maintain consistent growth throughout every session.
Prioritize upgrades that provide the strongest progression improvements.
Use rebirth systems at optimal times to increase long-term growth.
Play consistently to maximize accumulated rewards and ranking gains.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Merge a Black Hole

questions.question: What is Merge a Black Hole?
questions.answer: Merge a Black Hole is a Roblox merge simulator where you grow a black hole by collecting objects, increasing its size, and unlocking upgrades to progress faster.

questions.question: Where can I play Merge a Black Hole?
questions.answer: You can play Merge a Black Hole for free on Roblox across PC, mobile, and tablet, all using the same account.

questions.question: How do I redeem codes in Merge a Black Hole?
questions.answer: In Merge a Black Hole, open the game, tap the Codes icon, enter your code into the box, and press Redeem to claim free coins and boosts.

questions.question: What is rebirth in Merge a Black Hole?
questions.answer: Rebirth in Merge a Black Hole resets your current progress in exchange for permanent bonuses that make every future growth cycle faster.

questions.question: Are there pets or items in Merge a Black Hole?
questions.answer: Yes. Merge a Black Hole includes collectible pets and boost items that improve resource farming and progression speed.

questions.question: How do I climb the Merge a Black Hole leaderboard?
questions.answer: To rank up in Merge a Black Hole, focus on efficient farming, smart upgrade choices, and well-timed rebirths for long-term growth.
